headline: The team behind AEGIS
subheadline: A specialized unit building the trust architecture for sovereign AI.

members.name: Ji Won Jeong
members.bio: Building sovereign AI infrastructure where autonomy is earned through verification. Obsessed with making AI systems you can actually trust.

members.name: Michael Kelly
members.bio: Exploring the intersection of AI and creative industries. Turning ambitious ideas into real-world partnerships and products.

members.name: Felicia Wang
members.bio: Shaping how the world sees AEGIS. Building authentic connections and telling the story of what we're creating.

values.title: Quality First
values.description: We'd rather ship one excellent system than ten mediocre ones. Every deployment reflects our commitment to trust.

values.title: Transparent
values.description: We tell you what we're doing, why, and what the tradeoffs are. No black boxes, no hidden agendas.

values.title: Pragmatic
values.description: We use what works. No technology religion—just results. If it helps you succeed, we'll use it.
